task_completion.description: Verify that an Autopsy case named 'Exfiltration_Analysis_2026' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy window title or case dashboard displaying the case name 'Exfiltration_Analysis_2026'.

task_completion.description: Verify that both the baseline and suspect images are added to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Data Sources' tree showing both 'corporate_baseline.dd' and 'suspect_seized.dd'.

task_completion.description: Verify that MD5 hashes from the baseline image are exported to a text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor displaying the contents of '/home/ga/evidence/baseline_hashes.txt' containing MD5 hashes (one per line).

task_completion.description: Verify that a 'Known' hash set named 'Corp_Baseline' is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Hash Sets' options/settings window showing a hash set named 'Corp_Baseline' configured with the type 'Known' (not Notable).

task_completion.description: Verify that the hash set is applied to identify anomalous files on the suspect drive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy UI showing hash lookup results, or a view of the suspect drive where known files are identified/filtered, leaving anomalous files.

task_completion.description: Verify that a pipe-delimited report of anomalous files is generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a pipe-delimited file (e.g., anomalous_files.csv) in /home/ga or /home/ga/Reports, containing a header and file entries.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the Autopsy GUI to perform the forensic analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Autopsy application interface being actively used to create the case, add data sources, and configure hash sets.

integrity.description: Verify that the pipe-delimited report appears to be generated from the tool or a script processing the tool's output.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report contains realistic file metadata and pipe delimiters, rather than being manually typed out with placeholder text.

integrity.description: Verify that the baseline hashes file contains actual MD5 hashes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The baseline_hashes.txt file contains valid 32-character hexadecimal strings, not dummy text or manually copied examples from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Autopsy case must be named 'Exfiltration_Analysis_2026' (Case Number: INV-EXF-009). The baseline image is '/home/ga/evidence/corporate_baseline.dd' and the suspect image is '/home/ga/evidence/suspect_seized.dd'. The baseline hashes must be exported to '/home/ga/evidence/baseline_hashes.txt'. The final pipe-delimited report is expected to be saved in the '/home/ga' directory (specifically '/home/ga/Reports/anomalous_files.csv' and a summary at '/home/ga/Reports/elimination_summary.txt').
